subcodes.first_line: Unto God belongeth the knowledge of the heavens and of the earth, and He hath manifested Himself through His Name, the All-Knowing, upon all things. Blessed is he who hath turned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله علم السموات و الارض و قد تجلی باسمه العلیم علی کل الاشیا طوبی لمن اقبل
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @knowledge; recognition of God, @empty learning; false spirituality, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God
